summary: The diff implements logo replacement across Navigation, Footer, ProfileSetupModal, BooksPage, and index.html favicon. However, the implementation uses the wrong asset path: all components reference '/assets/Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_180351_0000-removebg-preview.png' directly instead of the required canonical path '/assets/generated/book-store-logo.png'. Additionally, there is no evidence that the image file was actually saved to 'frontend/public/assets/generated/book-store-logo.png' as a new static asset.

missing_requirements.requirement: Save the uploaded image as a static asset at 'frontend/public/assets/generated/book-store-logo.png' and reference it via that path in all logo locations.
missing_requirements.reason: No file was added at 'frontend/public/assets/generated/book-store-logo.png' (ADDED FILES: none). All components use the path '/assets/Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_180351_0000-removebg-preview.png' instead of '/assets/generated/book-store-logo.png'. The favicon in index.html also references the original filename rather than the canonical generated path.
